RAHUL MENON
Data Scientist / Machine Learning Engineer — Bengaluru, India

SUMMARY
Data scientist with 6 years turning messy data into shipped ML products.
Strength in NLP, recommender systems, and experimentation. Comfortable owning a
model from problem framing and EDA through training, evaluation, and serving.

SKILLS
Python, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face
Transformers, NLP, embeddings, LLMs, XGBoost, SQL, Spark, A/B testing,
causal inference, statistics, hypothesis testing, MLflow, Airflow, Docker,
FastAPI, feature engineering, time-series forecasting.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Data Scientist, Consumer Tech (2021–present)
- Built a transformer-based semantic search and recommendation system
  (sentence-transformers + FAISS) lifting click-through 18%.
- Designed and analyzed A/B tests with CUPED variance reduction and Bayesian
  decision rules; partnered with PMs on rollout decisions.
- Trained and deployed churn and LTV models (XGBoost) served via FastAPI;
  monitored drift with MLflow.

Data Scientist, Healthcare Analytics (2018–2021)
- Developed NLP pipelines extracting structured fields from clinical notes
  (spaCy, BERT) with 0.92 F1.
- Built time-series demand forecasts (Prophet, ARIMA) reducing stockouts 22%.

EDUCATION
M.Sc. Statistics — Indian Statistical Institute; B.Sc. Mathematics

PUBLICATIONS
Co-authored a workshop paper on domain-adaptive text embeddings.
